name: Giyani Metals Corp.
summary: Giyani Metals Corp. engages in the exploration, evaluation, and development of manganese and precious metal mining projects in Botswana, Africa. The company's flagship project is the K.Hill project covering a total license area of 2,588 square kilometers located in southeastern Botswana. It also holds interest in Otse and Lobatse manganese prospects. The company was formerly known as Giyani Gold Corp. and changed its name to Giyani Metals Corp. in July 2017. Giyani Metals Corp. was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Toronto, Canada.
